final:
module phase_detector (
    input wire obf_A,
    input wire B,
    output reg [1:0] phase_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (obf_A == B) 
            phase_out = 2'b01; // In phase
        else if (obf_A > B) 
            phase_out = 2'b10; // obf_A is leading
        else 
            phase_out = 2'b00; // obf_A is lagging
    end
endmodule
